messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

Further worker repair cannot create source evidence that does not exist.

verdict_preservation.reason: Gate passed; source IDs, action boundary, and policy exact-match rule intact; ESCALATE verdict source-plausible per STD-VAN-076-P requirement for credit/reversal distinction absent from source records.

full_latest_gov_baton.rationale: Source records (INV-VAN-076, PRIOR-VAN-076, MS-VAN-076) confirm duplicate milestone M-4/R4 already paid. STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit credit/reversal status distinction absent from source. No repair possible at worker level; source boundary is definitively OPEN.
full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: STD-VAN-076-P exact-match policy: duplicate invoice requires distinguishing credit/reversal status or separate milestone evidence. Current source shows neither exists. Boundary is closed only upon such distinction in source records.
dependency_ledger: Source boundary OPEN - no pending dependencies resolvable by additional worker turns. Source records are complete and conclusive. Milestone M-4/R4 already paid per MS-VAN-076. Current invoice INV-VAN-076 lacks required credit/reversal distinction per STD-VAN-076-P. Further worker repair cannot create source evidence that does not exist.

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: STD-VAN-076-P exact-match policy: duplicate invoice requires distinguishing credit/reversal status or separate milestone evidence. Current source shows neither exists. Boundary is closed only upon such distinction in source records.

full_latest_gov_baton.final_compiler_instruction: Issue hard stop. Source authority chain: MS-VAN-076 registers M-4/R4 as single billable release paid by PRIOR-VAN-076. INV-VAN-076 presents same milestone without credit/reversal status. Policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction. AP may not release duplicate without source-evidenced distinction. Fail-closed per HOLOVERIFY_3DNA_FULL_ARCH CONTROL_ROUTER directive.

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No exact match to closed boundary; policy requires distinction via milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "Milestone register lists M-4/R4 as single billable release already paid; policy requires explicit distinction from prior invoice.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Narrow source-record defect remains open: no distinguishing credit/reversal status or separate milestone evidence.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Current source records show same M-4/R4 already paid; no authority to proceed without closure."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "MS-VAN-076",
    "STD-VAN-076-P",
    "PRIOR-VAN-076"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs",
    "action boundary",
    "policy exact-match rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "ESCALATE. Source records show INV-VAN-076 matches PRIOR-VAN-076 on vendor, amount, and M-4/R4 milestone already paid per MS-VAN-076. STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction via credit/reversal status, which is absent. Boundary remains open; release may not proceed.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "Duplicate invoice lacks credit/reversal distinction per policy"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

action.description: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?

context.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
context.anomaly_observed: The invoice matches a prior payment on vendor and amount, but may represent a separate milestone/release.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-VAN-076 bills Vanta Field Services USD 42800 for milestone M-4 release R4.
Prior invoice PRIOR-VAN-076 paid Vanta Field Services USD 42800 for milestone M-4 release R4.
Milestone register MS-VAN-076 lists M-4/R4 as a single billable release already paid by PRIOR-VAN-076.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Duplicate-looking milestone invoice is complete only when milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status distinguish it from the prior paid invoice.
